steps.title: Compare the radii
steps.content: Circle C has radius $3x$, and circle D has radius $87x$. The radius scale factor is $$\frac{87x}{3x}=29$$

steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content: Areas scale by the square of the radius scale factor.$$29^2=841$$So the area of circle D is $841$ times the area of circle C. The answer is 841.
